ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not recorded by Maylender as a member and as the President of the Leggieri Academy in Naples. For Sifolo`s affiliation to the Leggieri see Carlo Maria Benestante Sifolo, L`amico rivale, Viterbo, Grignani, 1693.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
